prds.title: Verifiable Task Completion
prds.notes: Foundation PRD for intelligent delegation - defines what 'success' means for task handoffs

prds.title: Checkpoint & State Serialization
prds.notes: Enables task handoff between agents - checkpoints capture work artifacts for resume

prds.title: Dynamic Reassignment
prds.notes: Automatic agent fallback and retry - uses checkpoints and verification contracts

prds.title: Toolkit-Wide Agent Organization Refactor
prds.notes: Extracts duplicated patterns to AGENTS.md and skills. Creates verification-contracts, dynamic-reassignment, self-correction, auth-config-check, critic-dispatch, session-state skills. Builder reduced from 2,255 to 1,312 lines (42%).

prds.title: Ad-hoc Analysis Phase with Task Specs
prds.notes: Adds analysis phase to ad-hoc mode. Introduces Task Specs with PRD-like lifecycle. Enables promotion to formal PRD when scope grows.

prds.title: Token Optimization for Large Agents and Skills
prds.notes: Split test-flow into 7 focused skills, update Builder loading protocol, extract Builder inline docs, implement PRD archive with 5-item rolling window.

prds.title: Vectorization Cloud Storage (Pinecone)
prds.notes: Add Pinecone cloud vector storage for cross-machine sync. Eliminates per-machine embedding costs and enables instant access on new machines.

prds.title: Builder Skill Extraction (Phase 2)
prds.notes: Extracted verification handling, dashboards, and error recovery from builder.md to 3 new skills. Reduced builder from 2,082 to 1,459 lines (-30%). Created builder-verification (14KB), builder-dashboard (5KB), builder-error-recovery (4KB).

prds.title: Session Unification (Always-On Coordination)
prds.notes: Unified solo and multi-session modes into always-on coordination with lazy heartbeat. Created session-setup skill, deprecated agents.multiSession flag, eliminated all solo/multi branching from builder.md and developer.md.

prds.title: Architecture-Aware Verification & Auth Acquisition
prds.notes: Builder auto-infers verification pipelines from app architecture (desktop/Electron → rebuild+relaunch, web → HMR). Added postChangeWorkflow schema, CLI-based headless auth acquisition, interactive rollout template for all projects.
